prompts.text: A full body shot at a three-quarter angle, her entire figure visible in a relaxed, natural standing pose. Soft studio lighting falls evenly across her against a clean background.
A full body shot from behind, her figure standing straight with her head turned slightly to one side. Soft, even lighting illuminates her full form against a clean background.
A full body shot of her seated in a relaxed posture, with her hands resting gently on her knees. Soft lighting illuminates her complete figure against a clean background.
A full body shot capturing her mid-stride in a natural, easy walking pose, viewed at a three-quarter angle. Soft lighting follows her movement against a clean background.
